greeting.headline: Meet a Digital Employee that quietly handles the busywork that slows you down —
greeting.headlineAccent: and adds value you never imagined.
greeting.intro: I'm your GoLuQ Digital Staffing Assistant. In under a minute I'll deploy a Digital Employee for your business — works 24×7, makes zero errors, takes zero salary, never takes leave. Pick a worker below and watch it work, live, for free.
greeting.reassure: Not technical? No problem. We train you in simple language so you can run your Digital Employee with full confidence — you're never left alone with something you don't understand.

voice.label: Digital Voice Calling Employee
voice.blurb: Calls back every missed lead in their own language.

support.label: Digital Customer Support Employee
support.blurb: Answers every customer, instantly, around the clock.

sales.label: Digital Sales Employee
sales.blurb: Chases, follows up, and closes — never forgets.

reception.label: Digital Receptionist
reception.blurb: Books, reminds, reschedules — your front desk that never sleeps.

workforce.label: Complete Digital Workforce
workforce.blurb: A coordinated team of 3–5 digital workers, in sync.

industries.prompt: Which industry is your business in?

assist.industry: Great choice! Now tell me — which industry is your business in? Tap the one that fits, and I'll show you a real example.
assist.launch: Perfect. Your Digital Employee is ready to go. Press Go Luq and watch it work — live, in seconds.
assist.simRun: Watch closely — your Digital Employee is working, right now.
assist.recap: Done! In just seconds, it finished what takes a person hours. Let me walk you through exactly what it did for you.
assist.booking: Impressive, isn't it? Let's get your very own Digital Employee started — it's free to try. Don't worry, I'll guide you through this, step by step.

recap.heading: Here's everything your Digital Employee just handled
recap.subtitle: What takes a person hours — finished while you read this line.

products.title: Real software we've delivered — live and in use today
products.subtitle: Each one ships with Digital Employee capabilities built right in.

eagleeye.name: EagleEye.work
eagleeye.desc: Decision intelligence for teams — plugs into Asana & Slack, filters out the noise, and delivers a daily audio brief of only the risks that need you.

sarathi.name: Sarathi-AI.com
sarathi.desc: A voice-first CRM for financial advisors — it follows up, nurtures, and guides every client across WhatsApp & Telegram, like your sharpest relationship manager.

nidaan.name: NidaanPartner.com
nidaan.desc: Insurance claim help, done right — when a claim is denied or stuck, Nidaan's experts review it and fight for what you're rightfully owed.

homeBuild.title: Want custom software built for your business?
homeBuild.subtitle: Our engineering team builds websites, apps, fully-offline software, and WhatsApp automations — own it, don't rent it. Mention it in your free trial.
homeBuild.cta: Start a free trial to discuss

about.name: Dushyant Sharma
about.bioShort: GoLuQ isn't built by a lab — it's built by someone who spent 20+ years inside the world's most demanding businesses, watching where they break and building what actually fixes them.
about.note: Prefer email? Write to dushyant@goluq.com — a real inbox you'll reach a real person at.
about.hero2: We have already solved it before.
about.heroSub: The only question is how fast you want it done.
about.founder1: Dushyant Sharma did not come from a technology lab. He came from the business floor.
about.founder2: He has sat inside the operations of some of the world's most demanding organisations — watching where processes break, where revenue leaks, and where good ideas die because the right technology was never built. That is what changed everything.
about.founder3: After 20+ years moving through leadership roles at Genpact, DXC Technology, Hexaware Technologies, Cornerstone OnDemand (EdCast), Definitive Healthcare, and HighLevel — across India, Dubai, and globally distributed teams spanning APAC, EMEA, and North America — he came to one conclusion:
about.founderPunch: Most businesses do not need more software. They need someone who understands their business well enough to build the right software. GoLuQ is that someone.
about.credSub: Expertise that is not just lived — it is credentialled by institutions that set the global standard.

creds.org: The Institutes Knowledge Group, Malvern PA, USA
creds.detail: Certified in Property & Casualty Insurance · Risk Management & Insurance
Agile Project Management · Microsoft Project · Business Workflows
Career Essentials in Generative AI · Microsoft Copilot Studio
Lean Six Sigma · Business Administration & Management
Complete AI Project Management · Generative AI Strategy & Case Studies

about.capSub: Think of GoLuQ as your complete digital arm — from a local Indore business automating customer follow-ups to a US enterprise needing a multi-tenant platform built from scratch.
about.capPunch: If it exists in the digital world, GoLuQ can design it, build it, deploy it, and run it.
about.diff1: Most agencies sell you a service. We solve your problem.
about.diff2: Every solution starts with one question: what does this business actually need to grow, save money, or stop bleeding? That question comes from 20 years inside businesses like yours — not as a vendor on the outside, but as the person responsible for making things work.
about.closeTitle: Wherever your business is, GoLuQ is ready.
about.closeBody: GoLuQ works with businesses across India and internationally — the US, UK, Australia, and APAC — because good business problems do not have a geography.
about.closePunch: If your business has a digital challenge, GoLuQ has a solution.

chat.title: Digital Staffing Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask me anything about your business
chat.greeting: Hi! 👋 Tell me your business type and I'll show you which Digital Employee fits — or ask me anything.
suggest: Is it really free to try?
I run a clinic — can it help?

greeting: Not sure where to start? Tap any worker to watch it handle a real job.
Take your time — pick the role closest to your business and see it work.
industry: Which industry fits you best? Tap one and I'll show a real example.
Pick your industry — the demo adapts to your exact business.
launch: Ready when you are — press Go Luq to watch it work, live.
Just one tap on Go Luq and you'll see it handle a full day's work.
booking: Stuck on the form? Just your name and number is enough to start.
It's a free trial — no risk. Want me to help you fill this in?
partner: Curious how much you could earn? Try the calculator above.
It's free to join — shall I guide you through signing up?

security.title: Serious about your security
security.subtitle: Your business data deserves real protection — here's how GoLuQ keeps it safe.

points.d: HTTPS/TLS on every request — your data is encrypted in transit.
Strict security headers and a content-security-policy block common web attacks.
API keys and secrets stay server-side — they never touch your browser.
We never sell or share your data. It stays yours, always.
Runs on Cloudflare's global, DDoS-protected network.
Token-based access — no customer passwords are ever stored.

partner.crossMention: Know other business owners? You can earn 35% every month by referring them.
partner.intro: Welcome! Want to earn every single month — without any tech skills? Refer GoLuQ Digital Employees to businesses you already know. You earn 35% every month for the first year, and keep earning for as long as they stay. Many partners run a small YouTube channel and earn while they sleep. Want me to show you how much you could make?

calc.title: Your earnings calculator
calc.planLabel: Which Digital Employee will you sell?
calc.refsLabel: How many businesses can you refer?
calc.caveat: Assumes referred businesses stay active. Real earnings vary.
calc.ask: Shall I guide you to register? It takes 2 minutes.

earn.a: 35% of the plan price every month for the first year, then 12% for as long as the business stays. Use the calculator above to see your numbers.

paid.q: When & how do I get paid?
paid.a: Monthly via UPI, after a ₹500 minimum, following a quick review. We collect your PAN + UPI at sign-up.

tech.q: Do I need any tech knowledge?
tech.a: None. You just connect us to the business — we handle setup and training. Your job is the introduction.

find.a: People you already know — local shops, clinics, your WhatsApp groups, or a small Hindi YouTube channel.

fee.a: No. It is completely free to join.

track.a: You get a personal link + code. Every click and lead shows up in your private dashboard.

reg.title: Register as a Partner
reg.name: Full name
reg.errUpi: Enter a valid UPI ID (e.g. name@bank).
reg.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

done.title: You're a GoLuQ Partner! 🎉
done.warning: Save this link — it's your private key, don't share it.
done.tip1: Share your link on WhatsApp today.
done.tip2: Make one short Hindi video explaining it.

dash.none: No activity yet — share your link to get started.
dash.payoutBody: We disburse via UPI once your approved balance reaches ₹500. Commission payouts may be subject to TDS under Indian tax law; PAN is required.
dash.invalid: Link not recognised — please re-check your private dashboard link.
